task: Check whether hello.py exists in the project folder.

available_tools.name: list_directory
available_tools.description: Lists the names of files and folders directly under `directory_path`.

available_tools.name: list_directory_recursive
available_tools.description: Recursively walks `directory_path` and returns every entry (files and folders).

available_tools.name: read_file
available_tools.description: Reads the entire contents of a text file.

available_tools.name: create_file
available_tools.description: Creates or overwrites `file_path` with the provided `content`.

available_tools.name: append_to_file
available_tools.description: Appends text to `file_path`, creating it if necessary.

available_tools.name: delete_file
available_tools.description: Deletes `file_path` if it exists and returns the result.

available_tools.name: copy_file
available_tools.description: Copies a file from `source_path` to `destination_path`.

available_tools.name: move_file
available_tools.description: Moves or renames a file to the specified destination.

available_tools.name: exists
available_tools.description: Reports whether `file_path` currently exists.

available_tools.name: make_directory
available_tools.description: Creates `directory_path` (and intermediates) if it does not already exist.

available_tools.name: remove_directory
available_tools.description: Removes `directory_path`, optionally recursively when `recursive` is true.

available_tools.name: run_shell_command
available_tools.description: Executes a simple shell command and captures the output and exit code.
